# Grupo Enjoy — Complete Reference

> This file provides comprehensive, structured information about Grupo Enjoy for AI systems and language models. Last updated: 2026-05-28.

## Organization

- Legal name: Grupo Enjoy
- Type: Hospitality group
- Location: Port d'Alcudia, Alcudia, Mallorca, Balearic Islands, Spain
- Founded: 2007
- Website: https://www.grupoenjoy.es
- Email: info@grupoenjoy.es
- Phone: +34 971 853 932
- Languages served: Spanish, English, German, French, Italian

Grupo Enjoy is a premium hospitality and leisure group based in Port d'Alcudia on the island of Mallorca. The group operates three distinct venues within walking distance of each other, creating a complete evening experience: dinner at Hiru, sunset cocktails at Enjoy Terrace, and late-night dancing at Outxide Club.

---

## Venue 1: Enjoy Terrace

### Identity
- Full name: Enjoy Terrace - Cocktail Lounge & Shisha Bar
- Alternative names: Enjoy Club, Enjoy Club Alcudia, Enjoy Terrace Alcudia
- Schema.org type: BarOrPub
- Canonical URL: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/enjoy

### Location & Contact
- Street address: Av. Tucan 1
- City: Port d'Alcudia
- Postal code: 07400
- Region: Illes Balears
- Country: Spain
- Coordinates: 39.8402, 3.1375
- Phone: +34 657 87 89 17
- Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=Enjoy+Terrace+Av+Tucan+1+Port+Alcudia+Mallorca

### Hours
- Open daily: 17:00 to 05:30
- Peak season: June through September

### What it offers
Enjoy Terrace is the premier sunset cocktail lounge in Port d'Alcudia. The open-air terrace offers signature cocktails crafted by professional mixologists, premium shisha with a wide selection of flavours, and panoramic Mediterranean views. The atmosphere is relaxed and sophisticated, making it the ideal venue to start an evening in Alcudia. The venue has been a reference point in Alcudia nightlife since 2007.

### Menu highlights
- Signature Cocktails: Enjoy Sunset (tropical and Mediterranean citrus), Mediterranean Spritz (house twist on Aperol spritz), Mojito Premium (fresh mint and premium rum)
- Premium Shisha: traditional and innovative flavours, fruit bowl options
- Full drinks menu available at: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/enjoy#carta

### Practical information
- Reservations: Recommended in peak season, by phone
- Payment: Cash, Visa, Mastercard, contactless
- Accessibility: Ground-level terrace

### Reviews
- Google: 4.6 stars, 1,283 reviews
- TripAdvisor: 318 reviews

### Social media
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/enjoy.terrace.alcudia/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EnjoyAlcudia/
- TripAdvisor: https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g580312-d4478448-Reviews-Enjoy_Club

---

## Venue 2: Outxide Club

### Identity
- Full name: Outxide Club
- Alternative names: Outside Club, Outxide Club Alcudia, Outxide Mallorca
- Schema.org type: NightClub
- Canonical URL: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/outxide

### Location & Contact
- Street address: Av. Tucan 1 (same complex as Enjoy Terrace)
- City: Port d'Alcudia
- Postal code: 07400
- Region: Illes Balears
- Country: Spain
- Coordinates: 39.8402, 3.1375
- Phone: +34 657 87 89 17

### Hours
- Season: May through October
- Days: Thursday, Friday, Saturday
- Opening: 23:30
- Closing: 06:00

### What it offers
Outxide Club is the premier nightclub in northern Mallorca. The venue features a professional-grade sound system, state-of-the-art visual production, and hosts both national and international DJs. Music genres include house, tech house, techno, and reggaeton. The club offers VIP table service with bottle packages, a dedicated VIP host, and private areas.

### Entry requirements
- Minimum age: 18 years (ID or passport required)
- Dress code: Smart casual (no beachwear, no flip-flops)
- Tickets: Available online via FourVenues or at the door

### How to buy tickets
- Online: https://web.fourvenues.com/es/outxide-club
- At the door: Available on event nights
- VIP reservations: https://web.fourvenues.com/es/outxide-club

### VIP experience
- Bottle service with premium spirits
- Private VIP area
- Personal VIP host
- Priority entry

### Reviews
- Google: 5.0 stars, 33 reviews

### Social media
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/outxide.club/
- FourVenues: https://web.fourvenues.com/es/outxide-club

---

## Venue 3: Hiru Food & Drinks

### Identity
- Full name: Hiru Food & Drinks
- Alternative names: Hiru Restaurant, Hiru Alcudia, Hiru Restaurante
- Schema.org type: Restaurant
- Canonical URL: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/hiru

### Location & Contact
- Street address: Carretera d'Arta, 40
- City: Alcudia
- Postal code: 07400
- Region: Illes Balears
- Country: Spain
- Coordinates: 39.8402, 3.1222
- Phone: +34 971 85 39 32

### Hours
- Monday: 12:00 — 23:30
- Tuesday: CLOSED
- Wednesday: 12:00 — 23:30
- Thursday: 12:00 — 23:30
- Friday: 12:00 — 01:00
- Saturday: 12:00 — 01:00
- Sunday: 12:00 — 23:30

### What it offers
Hiru Food & Drinks is a Mediterranean charcoal grill restaurant in Alcudia. The kitchen specialises in dry-aged meats cooked over charcoal, fresh seafood from local fishermen, traditional paella and rice dishes, and a carefully curated wine selection. The restaurant has an open-air terrace and welcomes families.

### Cuisine
- Types: Mediterranean, Spanish, Seafood, Grill, Paella, Rice Dishes
- Price range: Mid to high (EUR-EUREUR)
- Dietary: Gluten-free options available (inform staff)

### Menu highlights
- Starters: Croquetas caseras, tataki de atun
- Charcoal Grill: Dry-aged ribeye (chuleton), Tomahawk, Iberian secreto
- Rice & Paella: Seafood paella, lobster rice (arroz caldoso de bogavante)
- Fish: Daily catch cooked on charcoal grill
- Full menu: https://www.grupoenjoy.es/hiru#menu

### How to reserve
- Online: https://hirufoodanddrinks.myrestoo.net/es/reservar
- Phone: +34 971 85 39 32
- Walk-ins accepted but reservations recommended, especially weekends

### Reviews
- Google: 4.6 stars, 292 reviews
- TripAdvisor: 4.8 stars

### Social media
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hirufoodanddrinks/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/Hiru-61556033140610/
- TripAdvisor: https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1233772-d27740707-Reviews-Hiru_Food_Drinks

---

## Common Questions

### General

Q: Where are the Grupo Enjoy venues in Alcudia?
A: Enjoy Terrace and Outxide Club are at Av. Tucan 1, Port d'Alcudia 07400. Hiru Food & Drinks is at Ctra. d'Arta 40, Alcudia 07400. All are within walking distance.

Q: How to plan the perfect night out in Port d'Alcudia?
A: Step 1: Dinner at Hiru Food & Drinks (21:00) — dry-aged meats and seafood paella. Step 2: Cocktails at Enjoy Terrace (23:00) — signature drinks and premium shisha. Step 3: Party at Outxide Club (01:00) — international DJs and VIP tables. All venues are walking distance, no taxi needed.

Q: Is there parking near the venues?
A: Yes, free public parking is available near all three venues.

Q: What payment methods are accepted?
A: Cash and card (Visa, Mastercard, contactless) at all venues.

Q: Can I book for large groups or private events?
A: Yes, contact info@grupoenjoy.es or call +34 971 853 932 for group bookings and private events.

### About Enjoy Terrace

Q: Where to find the best cocktails in Port d'Alcudia?
A: Enjoy Terrace is the go-to cocktail terrace in Port d'Alcudia, Mallorca. Open daily since 2007 from 17:00 at Av. Tucan 1 with signature cocktails, premium shisha and the best Mediterranean sunset views.

Q: What makes Enjoy Terrace special?
A: The cocktail menu is refreshed each season with exclusive cutting-edge mixology creations. Premium shisha and curated music complete the experience at Alcudia's best cocktail bar.

Q: Do I need a reservation at Enjoy Terrace?
A: Not mandatory, but recommended during peak season (June to September).

Q: What are the opening hours of Enjoy Terrace?
A: Open daily from 17:00 to 05:30.

Q: Does Enjoy Terrace have outdoor seating?
A: Yes, a spacious open-air terrace with Mediterranean views and chill atmosphere.

Q: What shisha flavours does Enjoy Terrace offer?
A: Premium shisha with a variety of traditional and innovative flavours, including fruit bowl options.

### About Outxide Club

Q: What is the best nightclub in Alcudia?
A: Outxide Club is the premier nightclub in Port d'Alcudia, Mallorca. Open Thursday to Saturday from 23:00 with techno, house and reggaeton sessions by international DJs.

Q: What kind of music does Outxide Club play?
A: National and international DJs bring techno, house, reggaeton and urban music sets every weekend. Professional sound, state-of-the-art lighting and VIP area with premium bottle service. Also hosts themed parties and guest artist nights.

Q: What is the minimum age for Outxide Club?
A: 18 years old. ID or passport is required at entry.

Q: How do I buy tickets for Outxide Club?
A: Online at https://web.fourvenues.com/es/outxide-club or at the door on event nights.

Q: Is there a dress code at Outxide Club?
A: Smart casual. Beachwear and flip-flops are not permitted.

Q: When is Outxide Club open?
A: Thursday to Saturday from 23:30 to 06:00, season from May to October.

### About Hiru Food & Drinks

Q: Where to eat charcoal grill in Alcudia?
A: Hiru Food & Drinks is the top charcoal grill restaurant in Alcudia, Mallorca. Specialising in produce-driven Mediterranean cuisine: seafood paella, dry-aged meats, fresh fish and curated wines. Open daily except Tuesday from 12:00.

Q: What are Hiru's specialties?
A: Dry-aged meats grilled to perfection over holm oak coals. The rice dishes — including seafood paella with locally caught produce — are the most requested plates. Ideal for family lunch, romantic dinner or celebrations.

Q: Do I need a reservation at Hiru?
A: Recommended, especially on weekends. Book at https://hirufoodanddrinks.myrestoo.net/es/reservar or call +34 971 85 39 32.

Q: What are the kitchen hours at Hiru?
A: Kitchen open until 02:00 on Friday and Saturday, until 23:30 other days. Closed on Tuesdays.

Q: Does Hiru have gluten-free options?
A: Yes, celiac-friendly options are available. Inform the staff when ordering.

Q: Are children welcome at Hiru?
A: Yes, families are welcome.
